message:
撰写 Method 子节 3.5 Dual-Path Semantic Diffusion。

★ 字数要求：约400词
★ 写入路径：SHARED/drafts/v2/section_method_3.5.tex

完整 outline：SHARED/outline/v2/paper_outline.md（读取 Method section 了解全貌）
已完成后序子节：SHARED/drafts/v2/section_method_3.4.tex（必须先读，确保内容衔接）

内容要求：
- Feature Path: U-Net based denoising of fault features conditioned on semantic vectors
- Semantic Path: parallel diffusion process refining semantic embeddings  
- Cross-Path Attention: bidirectional attention mechanism aligning feature and semantic representations at each denoising step
- Forward diffusion process: q(x_t | x_{t-1})
- Reverse denoising: p_θ(x_{t-1} | x_t, s)
- Noise schedule and training objective

严格按字数要求撰写。开头要自然承接 3.4 结尾（数据预处理后的特征 normalized）。
